And so it's just happening. Now another version of this is polls. So polls can be right me on a scale of one to 10. Better be sure you're going to get at least 11s in this. One of the best webinars that I've done over the years is one where I'll have 15 things that I'm going to present. 15 tips, which I don't recommend that we normally do, but every once in a while it's fun to do something like this. I like to do this with a host. And I put a bunch of them up on the screen and I allow the host to choose which one we're going to do next. And that's a fun webinar. And then every five of those, I ask people to choose which one was their favorite. So by the time they're done, they've got three favorites of 15. And then at the end, I ask them to rate which of those three are the one that they're going to use. And that becomes a very interactive presentation and literally causes people to buy like crazy.
